Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Sysbiolab Team. Author.

  • Victor Apolonio. Contributor.

  • Jonathan Back. Contributor.

  • Lana Querne. Contributor.

  • Vinicius Chagas. Contributor.

  • Bahar Tercan. Contributor.

  • Mauro Castro. Maintainer.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Tercan B, Apolonio VH, Chagas VS, Wong CK, Lee JA, et al. Protocol for assessing distances in pathway space for classifier feature sets from machine learning methods. STAR Protocols 6(2):103681, 2025. doi: 10.1016/j.xpro.2025.103681

@Article{,
  author = {Bahar Tercan and Victor H Apolonio and Vinicius S Chagas and Christopher K Wong and Jordan A Lee and Christina Yau and Christopher C Benz and Joshua M Stuart and Brian J Karlberg and Kyle Ellrott and Jasleen K Grewal and Steven JM Jones and The Cancer Genome Atlas Analysis Network and Jean C Zenklusen and A. Gordon Robertson and Peter W Laird and Andrew D Cherniack and Mauro AA Castro},
  title = {Protocol for assessing distances in pathway space for classifier feature sets from machine learning methods},
  journal = {STAR Protocols},
  year = {2025},
  volume = {6},
  number = {2},
  pages = {103681},
  doi = {10.1016/j.xpro.2025.103681},
}

Ellrott K, Wong CK, Yau C, Castro MAA, Lee JA, Karlberg BJ, Grewal JK, Lagani V, Tercan B et al. Classification of non-TCGA cancer samples to TCGA molecular subtypes using compact feature sets. Cancer Cell 43(2):195-212.e11, 2025. doi: 10.1016/j.ccell.2024.12.002

@Article{,
  author = {Kyle Ellrott and Christopher K Wong and Christina Yau and Mauro AA Castro and Jordan A Lee and Brian J Karlberg and Jasleen K Grewal and Vincenzo Lagani and Bahar Tercan and et al.},
  title = {Classification of non-TCGA cancer samples to TCGA molecular subtypes using compact feature sets},
  journal = {Cancer Cell},
